ddls:
CREATE TABLE "content" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of content */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publisher of the content */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the content */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the content */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or summary of the content */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date and time the content was published */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the content was last updated */,
  "num_images" INTEGER /* Number of images associated with the content */,
  "caption" TEXT /* Caption for the content */,
  "credit_source" TEXT /* Credit or source of the content */,
  "content_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of content (e.g., article, image, video) */,
  "is_published" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the content is published */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the content was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the content was last updated */,
  "content_status" TEXT /* Status of the content (e.g., draft, review, published) */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the content has received */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of times the content has been shared */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* A calculated score based on views, shares, comments, and ratings */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the content */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or geographic area the content is targeted towards */,
  "is_premium" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the content is premium (e.g., requires a subscription) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_content_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_type_id") REFERENCES content_types ("content_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the publisher */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the publisher */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the publisher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the publisher */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the publisher */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province of the publisher */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the publisher */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Postal or zip code of the publisher */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the publisher is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the publisher was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the publisher was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_types" (
  "content_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the content type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the content type */,
  "is_rich_media" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the content type supports rich media */,
  "max_file_size" REAL /* Maximum file size for this content type */,
  "allowed_file_types" TEXT /* Allowed file types for this content type (e.g., .jpg, .mp4) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content the image is associated with */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "caption" TEXT /* Caption for the image */,
  "credit_source" TEXT /* Credit or source of the image */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the image in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date and time the image was uploaded */,
  "alt_text" TEXT /* Alternative text for accessibility */,
  "width" INTEGER /* Width of the image */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the image */,
  "is_watermarked" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the image has a watermark */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content the video is associated with */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of the video */,
  "caption" TEXT /* Caption for the video */,
  "credit_source" TEXT /* Credit or source of the video */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the video in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date and time the video was uploaded */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the video */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL of the video thumbnail */,
  "is_watermarked" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the video has a watermark */,
  "video_format" TEXT /* Format of the video (e.g., MP4, AVI) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_videos_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., editor, publisher, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "is_2fa_enabled" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if two-factor authentication is enabled */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the content */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the content was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the content */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the content */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user accessing the content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content the version is associated with */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, approved) */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the version */,
  "is_rollback" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if this version was a rollback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_versions_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the category is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_categories" (
  "content_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content-category relationship */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_categories_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_categories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the tag is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_tags" (
  "content_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content-tag relationship */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_tags_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_tags_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content the comment is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was made */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the comment is approved */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was last updated */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the comment has received */,
  "dislikes" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the comment has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content the rating is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "rating_value" INTEGER /* Value of the rating (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date and time the rating was given */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the rating was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the rating was last updated */,
  "is_reviewed" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the rating has been reviewed by a moderator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, edit) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the role is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_mappings" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_mappings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_mappings_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
